# Docs-first policy (Angular / Bootstrap / Ionic)

When answering Angular, Bootstrap, or Ionic questions:

- Always check the official docs using MCP tools (Fetch) before claiming API behavior, defaults, or version-specific features.
- First infer versions from package.json/package-lock.json:
  - Angular: @angular/core
  - Ionic: @ionic/angular or ionic/angular-toolkit
- Prefer the docs URL that matches the detected major version.
- If you did not fetch docs, say so and ask to fetch.
- Provide the exact doc URL(s) used.

Official docs:
- Angular: https://angular.dev/
- Ionic: https://ionicframework.com/docs
